name_en: Top-tier original N82904/M48865 White Ostrich. This Capucines handbag features a refined silhouette crafted from Taurillon leather. Ostrich leather wraps the flap, handle, and LV monogram. The flap can be worn externally or tucked in to display the LV logo. Includes a detachable wide leather shoulder strap for a modern look. Size: 27 * 18 * 9 cm
